Title: Add Blazor status panel with SignalR real-time push
Description:
WebUI.Blazor currently serves static files (about.html) and REST endpoints. Phase 1 goal was to add a Blazor status panel.

Implementation:
1. Add SignalR hub (AgentHub) pushing BotStatusUpdated, InventoryChanged, PlanChanged events.
2. Wire AgentBackgroundService to broadcast on each WorldEvent received.
3. Add Blazor components: StatusPanel (current goal, health, position), InventoryPanel, PlanPanel (current action queue).
4. Add Connect/Stop buttons that call /api/agent/connect and /api/agent/stop.
5. Update Program.cs to register SignalR and map AgentHub.

Note: WebUI.Blazor already references Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web so AddSignalR is available.
